subcodes.title: Saqi  bidih abi
subcodes.first_line: O Cup-Bearer, give me a drop of the mystic Flame, that it may wash my soul from the whispers of the flesh
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساقی بده آبی زآن شعله فارانی تا که بشویم جان را از وسوسه نفسانی زآن آب کزو
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation, @love as fire
